author: DominicVainMod
content:
Your First Ink Airdrop Just Landed!,Hey everyone, we just airdropped your earned Ink to your marketplace inventory!   

How to claim:
Go to https://play.staratlas.com/inventory/,Connect the wallet you used to earn Ink in Star Atlas,Find the Ink item and click "Claim Airdrop",You're good to go!,
You can still earn Ink! Keep loading into shooter and racing matches to get more!

INK IS AN EXCLUSIVE STAR ATLAS RESOURCE. IT HAS NOTHING TO DO WITH THE UPCOMING Z.INK AIRDROP CAMPAIGN.

 | https://play.staratlas.com/inventory/

@everyone
